title: Admin sees customer screen share (WebRTC fix)
description:
Customer-initiated remote help on HTTPS was broken: the admin sent the WebRTC offer while the customer was still in the screen-share consent/picker, before the customer's peer connection existed. The offer signal was marked as processed but never handled, so the customer never sent an SDP answer and the admin never received the video track — status stayed on "Waiting for customer screen share…" even though the customer saw "Screen sharing active".

Fix: queue remote-signal events until remoteRtc is ready, flush after attach, and only advance lastSignalId after a signal is actually applied. Also harden admin ontrack when browsers omit e.streams[0], and update admin status to "Connected — viewing customer screen" when the track arrives.

Who is affected: OVH PipeShare/PipeSync HTTPS remote help (dbg160). HTTP DOM relay unchanged. SaaS unchanged until version publish.
changeLog: Fix lost WebRTC offer when admin connects before customer finishes screen-share picker.
Queue remote-signal until peer connection exists; flush on attach.
Admin ontrack: build MediaStream from track when streams array is empty.
Admin status: "Connected — viewing customer screen" when video track arrives.
